arguments.prompt:
A vibrant and energetic cycling promotional banner. The scene shows a dynamic outdoor setting with a cyclist riding through a sunlit urban park or greenway. The atmosphere is fresh, lively, and sporty with bright blue sky, lush greenery, and warm sunlight. Modern cityscape or natural landscape in background.

TEXT RENDERING (CRITICAL - MUST BE LARGE AND PROMINENT):
- Main title "骑行返现" rendered in VERY LARGE, BOLD, EYE-CATCHING font, prominently displayed in the upper-center area of the image. Use bright colors like orange, red, or yellow with high contrast against the background. Add glow effects or outlines if needed for better visibility.
- Subtitle "骑行领现金 越骑越有钱" rendered in clearly readable size below the main title, also with high contrast.

IMPORTANT: Render the Chinese text EXACTLY as quoted, character by character. Do NOT alter, omit, or substitute any character. The main title "骑行返现" must be the most dominant visual element.

Style: Vibrant, fresh, sporty, energetic. High contrast, bright colors (blues, greens, oranges). Professional marketing banner quality. Clean layout with clear focal point on the text.
